summary: In this powerful episode, Devina Mehra (Founder & Chairperson, @FirstGlobalSecurities ) breaks down the harsh truths of investing — why smart investors look beyond borders, why small caps are a dangerous obsession, and why there’s no magic wand for the next multibagger.
